verse_text: For a man indeed ought not to cover his head, since he is the image and glory of God; but woman is the glory of man.

links.context: Vineyards and wine (v. 16) symbolize the Eucharist, and clothing (v. 17) points to being clothed with Christ in baptism. As woman is the glory of man ([[1CO.11:7]]), so the Church is the glory of Christ ([[EPH.5:21]]).

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
